name: open-graph-v1-sample-b-1200x630
prompt: Create a second premium open graph image for Surnex. Use the attached anchor image only as a style anchor. Dark product-led scene, one clean central dashboard cluster, high contrast, restrained lime routing lines, polished and expensive, simpler than hero art, optimized for thumbnail readability and social sharing. Compose for approximately 1200x630 wide crop. No readable text. No fake UI labels. No logo. No wordmark. No clutter. Output image only.
